'''Ty Matthews''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] around the time of the [[Bakura Truce]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. He joined the Rebellion on his fifteenth birthday. His father was [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Tev Matthews]].

Ty Matthews served as chief aide in [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar's]] war room aboard [[Home One/Legends|Home One]]. He had the responsibility of storing and displaying tactical data.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
